---
applyTo: "**"
---

# Workspace Instructions

## Worktree Policy

**Do NOT modify files inside worktree directories.**

Worktree paths follow the pattern:
```
g:\code\vPress\vitepress-plugin-blogs.worktrees\**
```

All edits must target the **main workspace** at:
```
g:\code\vPress\vitepress-plugin-blogs\**
```

If a task requires changes that would normally apply to a worktree path, apply them to the equivalent path in the main workspace instead.
